markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy prioritizing tour page optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** The weekly output shifts from 7 blog posts to a 4/3 split (4 tour pages, 3 blog posts) to prioritize high-revenue tour pages.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Tour Page Optimization:** "Grade D" tour pages will be optimized for SEO first to increase visibility, followed by UX/UI improvements to boost conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**AI Search Tracking:** A new platform, CheckDot, will replace Scrunch to track AI search visibility (citations in LLM summaries) across 300 prompts for Vallarta, Cabo, and Cancun.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Safety Content:** GrowthX will create content addressing recent safety concerns in Mexico to reassure tourists and capitalize on a high-interest SEO topic.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

## Topics

### Mexico Safety Concerns

  - [Recent safety incidents in Mexico (Vallarta, Guadalajara) caused a surge in traffic to the "Vallarta Safe" blog and cancellation pages.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will create reassuring content (blog posts, reels) to counter "fake news" and provide real-time updates for tourists.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a high-interest SEO opportunity to build trust and capture traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### New Content Strategy: Tour Page Priority

  - [**Problem:** "Grade D" tour pages have zero revenue and weak SEO (e.g., ranking for only one keyword), making them a key optimization opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift content focus to prioritize these high-revenue pages.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [**Weekly Output:** 4 tour pages optimized + 3 blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
    1.  [**SEO First:** Optimize on-page content to increase keyword rankings and visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
    2.  [**UX/UI Second:** After SEO results are measured (e.g., 3-month vs. 3-month comparison), implement CRO changes like an above-the-fold booking button.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [**Approval Workflow:** All tour page content changes require Adventures' approval, using a change-tracking method (e.g., colored text) to ensure clarity.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### AI Search Visibility with CheckDot

  - [**Platform:** CheckDot will replace Scrunch to track AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Setup:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [3 profiles will be created (Vallarta, Cabo, Cancun).](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
      - [100 prompts per location (300 total) will be created and sent for review.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Include a minority of general "Mexico" prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To see if Adventures' content is cited as a source for national-level topics, building brand awareness against larger competitors like Xcaret.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

### Project Management & Logistics

  - [**Shared Workspace:** A new Notion database was created to centralize all project docs (analyses, strategies, content pipeline).](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [**Banner Implementation:** Development is delayed until next week due to a higher-priority booking engine update.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 44 new topics are in the "considering" stage, balancing top-funnel awareness with bottom-funnel conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**Team Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
      - [**Mariana (GrowthX):** OOO March 23 for 3 weeks; a rotating managing editor will cover, focusing on tour page optimizations.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=2021.0)
      - [**New Cancun Contact:** Isabel will add Iradis to the team chat and assign pending content tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Saul:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Complete the promotions calendar and tour repository today.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Review the Vallarta Adventures analysis doc in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Create 300 CheckDot prompts and send for review.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Find the competitor list in the original Notion doc.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [Create content addressing Mexico safety concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Isabel:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
      - [Add Iradis (new Cancun contact) to the team chat.](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)
  - [**Lu:**](https://fathom.video/share/uEmmxkSSqtoR1C4ou4aAWsBBxmBqd4uf?tab=summary&timestamp=2095.0)
